title: Profile Analyzer Walkthrough
subtitle: Research another account and pull strategy from it

scenes.caption: Open Profile Analyzer and frame the tool.
scenes.narration: Profile Analyzer lets you study another account's strategy, voice, and engagement patterns so you can learn from them without copying blindly.
scenes.overlay_body: Research the account, then steal the right lessons.

scenes.caption: Enter the account handle.
scenes.narration: Start with the handle you want to study. This lets the tool pull recent posts, summarize the voice, and surface repeatable tactics.
scenes.overlay_body: Pick the account you want to study first.

scenes.caption: Run the research pass.
scenes.narration: Hit Research and the analyzer breaks down the account's themes, tone, engagement tactics, and where your own edge is stronger.
scenes.overlay_body: Get themes, tactics, voice, and strategic takeaways.
